description_long: This is a classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, a black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. The rifle features a long, cylindrical barrel with a front sight post and a rear sight mounted on the receiver. The wooden elements have a polished, reddish-brown finish, contrasting with the matte black metal components. The magazine is prominently curved and appears to be made of metal or polymer. The trigger, trigger guard, and pistol grip are clearly visible, with the grip made of a darker material. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, typical of military rifles used in urban environments.
description: A robust assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. The design is utilitarian and suited for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel end, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, wooden stock and handguard, curved magazine, and sighting system.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, rear sight, and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wooden stock, handguard, and the magazine from the other side.
